title.en: Many True Ancestors sat down one by one, waitin...

content.en:
When the true ancestors of the human race arrived one by one, they found that Ye Tian's face was very ugly, and a wave of anger seemed to be about to be vented, and they were suddenly very nervous.

In particular, there were several True Ancestors who had already gotten some news, so they knew that this time the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestors were furious.

Over the years, many true ancestors of the human race have been born, although most of them are very weak true ancestors, but they are also true ancestors.

Soon, about tens of thousands of True Ancestors gathered here, these were almost half of the True Ancestors of the Human Race, and some True Ancestors were trained in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm or in retreat or in some secret realm, and it was difficult to come for a while.

"It's almost time for the people to arrive, so let's start the meeting!"

Ye Tian said.

Many True Ancestors sat down one by one, waiting for Ye Tian's narration.

"Who founded the Cloud Sky Sect?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes...... It's me!"

An ordinary True Ancestor stepped forward.

He is the Supreme Elder of the Yunxiao Sect, and he is also the first generation of the Yunxiao Sect Master, known as the Yunxiao True Ancestor.

"Yunxiao True Ancestor, you Yunxiao Sect recruits geniuses, don't you even check the character of the other party? A scumbag who operates the sale of beautiful women of the human race, you also accept it, and you also accept it as a true disciple!" Ye Tian said coldly.

Yunxiao True Ancestor was covered in a cold sweat, and he finally realized what had happened in Yunxiao Sect before.

At that time, he was not in the sect, and when he learned that someone had captured a true disciple through the air, he was also angry, but he didn't expect it to be done by the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws.

"Yunxiao knows that he is wrong, and he must strictly manage this aspect in the future!"

Yunxiao True Ancestor hurriedly said.

"Take a look at this information!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and tens of thousands of materials were delivered to the True Ancestors.

Soon, these True Ancestors saw the contents, some were angry, some were unimpressed, and some were expressionless.

"Do some of you think that some ordinary mortal women don't matter how much they kill and sell more, do they? Let me tell you, you can kill people from other forces and slaughter the sects of other forces, but people of the human race, even if they are ordinary people, you can't arbitrarily torture and kill them or even treat them as pleasure things!"

Ye Tian reprimanded.

"Next, I'll read a list!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Huayang True Ancestor!"

"Yongle True Ancestor!"

"Ming Xuan True Ancestor!"

"Black Xuan True Ancestor!"

......

The name of a true ancestor was read by Ye Tian.

After these True Ancestors were read, they were very nervous one by one.

About hundreds of True Ancestors were read, and then Ye Tian continued: "Of these True Ancestors I read just now, a few of them didn't come, but most of them are here. You may be able to guess why I pronounce your name and take the initiative to tell me my guilt!"

Voiceless!

As the seconds passed, these True Ancestors were all considered dumb.

"Don't you want to say yes?" Ye Tian said indifferently: "It's not enough for you to kill you ten times, I thought that the human race was prosperous, and you should work together to manage the human race, but you secretly did a lot of heinous things, and even killed many human geniuses, colluding with foreign races, in short, you have too many crimes!"

Bang bang bang!!!

A True Ancestor knelt on the ground and hurriedly said, "Ten Thousand True Ancestors, we know that we are wrong, please give us a chance!"

"No need, the human race has no shortage of true ancestors!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

As soon as these words came out, the expressions of the hundreds of True Ancestors changed drastically.

Immediately, several True Ancestors realized something and flew towards the outside of the temple one by one, as if trying to escape.

However.

Ye Tian only snapped his fingers, and those True Ancestors were shattered and died one by one.

No matter how they resisted or escaped, they were like ants in Ye Tian's eyes.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of True Ancestors had all fallen, leaving nothing behind.

The other True Ancestors looked at this scene and truly realized how big the gap between themselves and Ye Tian was, it was simply a world of difference.

Ye Tian continued: "There are still some people, although their sins are not deep, and their contributions to the human race are not small, I can not blame them in the past, but in the future, if I find that such a thing has happened, then the fate of these true ancestors today is your fate." In addition, there are some descendants of the True Ancestors who behave more hatefully than these True Ancestors. I want you to investigate with all your might, even if it is your own wife and children, if you have a great sin, you will be killed! If you don't kill, then I will come, but if I kill, I won't kill a few people!"

"You go ahead and do it, I hope that in a few decades, the sky of the Terrans will be blue and fresh, not as muddy as it is now!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Many True Ancestors have responded one after another.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

Many Terran True Ancestors left one by one, and everyone trembled when they left, and even a few True Ancestors with a not very clean foundation couldn't even fly steadily.

Next.

The countless starry sky continents of the human race are all under investigation, countless families and sects have been shattered, and even a large number of True Monarchs and Heavenly Monarchs have been arrested and executed.

There are even true ancestors who are ruthless and directly execute the heirs who have committed heinous crimes.

Scenes were staged all over the Terrans, and what happened to the Terrans for a while shocked the entire Void Heaven Kingdom.

Decades later, the human race lost a large number of True Monarchs, Heavenly Monarchs, and Divine General-level powerhouses, and even the population lost nearly one percent at once.

It can be seen that in the past few decades, how many people have been executed by the human race, hundreds of billions of ...... And all the men were turned into bones.

Judging from a short period of time, the human race is undoubtedly cutting itself off by doing this, but Ye Tian knows very well that this is a necessary measure.

The human race is not a sect, but a race, if it is corrupted from the bottom, it will be difficult to be excavated in the future, and it will be easy to be persecuted and killed.

In the long run, except for some geniuses with backgrounds, civilian geniuses don't want to rise at all, and the occurrence of countless tragedies will provoke the internal disintegration of the human race.

In that case, after countless years, the Terran race will no longer be able to develop at all, and even the entire Terran race will be completely abolished.

By that time, it was too late.

Therefore, we must eliminate some bad people and things as soon as possible, so that the entire human race can prosper, this is the real prosperous era.

Hundreds of years have passed, and under a series of perfect policies formulated by Ye Tian, the number of geniuses of the human race has far exceeded that of the past.

Moreover, the major forces of the human race are very strict with their character, and those with poor character will not be included even if they have good talent.

And at this time, the two top geniuses of the human race also rose.

They are Ye Tian's sons and daughters - Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue's own talents are very high, but they were just sealed by Ye Tian, and now that the seal has been lifted, their cultivation speed is far faster than before.

In just a few hundred years, plus some time to accelerate the formation, they have already stepped into the level of divine generals, coupled with that powerful bloodline and physical body, their combat power is comparable to that of eight or nine star divine generals.

The human race is prosperous, and the children have grown up.

Ye Tian was also relieved to retreat and cultivate, and he didn't have to worry too much about other things.

Unconsciously, 300,000 years have passed in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

On this day, Ye Tian's cultivation had finally reached the realm of Great Dao Consummation, and the strength of his physical body and true ancestor had almost reached the limit of his true ancestor.

In addition, he also comprehended a trace of the Xeon Wind Dao, and the Xeon Life Dao has also made some progress, and the Xeon Sword Dao has improved rapidly, almost realizing one percent of the Xeon Sword Dao.

At this rate, the day when he would reach half of the supreme sword path would not be too far away.

At this moment, Ye Tian's combat power has improved a lot compared to the past, and he has recently felt the shackles, as if it is difficult to break this shackles.

"This should be the shackles between the Invincible True Ancestor and the Supreme True Ancestor that Jiu'er said, once it is broken, it will definitely be able to condense the Supreme Dao Source!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But how do you break this shackle?

The forbidden body has reached a small level, or has it cultivated a Thousand Dao Techniques to perfection?

But either way, the difficulty is exaggerated, and it can't be done in a moment.

this day.

Ye Tian suddenly felt the aura of an invincible True Ancestor, and it was not far from him.

He knew that Ouyang Jiu'er had finally refined the root of the Forbidden Divine Tree, thus breaking the Origin Brand and rushing into the Invincible True Ancestor's combat power level.

Immediately, he came to Ouyang Jiu'er's residence and congratulated: "Jiu'er, congratulations on entering the ranks of the invincible true ancestors!"
